member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteDataProviderFactory`1
member.summary: Interface for providing a ISpriteEditorDataProvider instance.
member.typeparam: The object type the implemented interface is interested in.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteDataProviderFactory`1.CreateDataProvider(`0)
member.summary: Implement the method to provide an instance of ISpriteEditorDataProvider for a given object.
member.param: The object that requires an instance of ISpriteEditorDataProvider.
member.returns: An instance of ISpriteEditorDataProvider or null if not supported by the interface.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteDataProviderFactories
member.summary: Utility class that collects methods with SpriteDataProviderFactoryAttribute and SpriteDataProviderAssetPathProviderAttribute.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteDataProviderFactories.Init
member.summary: Initialized and collect methods with SpriteDataProviderFactoryAttribute and SpriteDataProviderAssetPathProviderAttribute.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteDataProviderFactories.GetSpriteEditorDataProviderFromObject(UnityEngine.Object)
member.summary: Given a UnityEngine.Object, determine the ISpriteEditorDataProvider associate with the object by going going through the methods with SpriteDataProviderFactoryAttribute.
member.remarks: When none of the methods is able to provide ISpriteEditorDataProvider for the object, the method will try to cast the AssetImporter of the object to ISpriteEditorDataProvider.
member.returns: The ISpriteEditorDataProvider associated with the object.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteDataProviderFactories.GetAssetPath(UnityEngine.Object)
member.summary: Given a UnityEngine.Object, determine the asset path associate with the object by going going through the methods with SpriteDataProviderAssetPathProviderAttribute.
member.remarks: When none of the methods is able to provide the asset path for the object, the method will return null
member.returns: The asset path for the object

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteDataProviderFactories.GetSpriteObject(UnityEngine.Object)
member.summary: Given a UnityEngine.Object, determine the Sprite object associate with the object by going going through the methods with SpriteObjectProviderAttribute.
member.remarks: When none of the methods is able to provide a Sprite object, the method will return null
member.returns: The Sprite object

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleBase
member.summary: Base class the Sprite Editor Window custom module inherits from.
member.remarks: Sprite Editor Window functionality can be extended by providing custom module. By inheriting from SpriteEditorModuleBase, user will be able to activate the module's functionality from Sprite Editor Window.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleBase.spriteEditor
member.summary: The ISpriteEditor instance that instantiated the module.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleBase.moduleName
member.summary: The module name to display in Sprite Editor Window.
member.value: String to represent the name of the module

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleBase.CanBeActivated
member.summary: Indicates if the module can be activated with the current ISpriteEditor state.
member.returns: Return true if the module can be activated.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleBase.DoMainGUI
member.summary: Implement this to draw on the Sprite Editor Window.
member.remarks: Called after Sprite Editor Window draws texture preview of the Asset.Use this to draw gizmos for Sprite data.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleBase.DoToolbarGUI(UnityEngine.Rect)
member.summary: Implement this to create a custom toolbar.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleBase.OnModuleActivate
member.summary: This is called when the user activates the module.
member.remarks: When user switches to the module via Sprite Editor Window, this method will be called for the module to setup.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleBase.OnModuleDeactivate
member.summary: This is called when user switches to another module.
member.remarks: When user switches to the another module in Sprite Editor Window, this method will be called for the module to clean up.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleBase.DoPostGUI
member.summary: Implement this to draw widgets in Sprite Editor Window.
member.remarks: This method is called last to allow drawing of widgets.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleBase.ApplyRevert(System.Boolean)
member.summary: This is called when user clicks on the Apply or Revert button in Sprite Editor Window.
member.param: True when user wants to apply the data, false when user wants to revert.
member.returns: Return true to trigger a reimport.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleModeSupportBase
member.summary: Base class for having SpriteEditorModule use as a mode in another SpriteEditorModuleBase

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleModeSupportBase.SetModuleModes(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Type})
member.summary: Modes that the module can be activated as.
member.param: Enumerable list of mode Type that can be activated

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorModuleMode.ActivateMode
member.summary: This is called when a SpriteEditorModeBase is activated as a mode.
member.returns: Return true if the mode is activated

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorModuleMode.DeactivateMode
member.summary: This is called when SpriteEditorModeBase is deactivated as a mode.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorModuleMode.OnAddToModule(UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleModeSupportBase)
member.summary: This is called SpriteEditorModeBase is added to a module.
member.param: The module that added this mode

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorModuleMode.OnRemoveFromModule(UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleModeSupportBase)
member.summary: This is called SpriteEditorModeBase is removed from a module.
member.param: The module that removed this mode

member.name: E:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorModuleMode.onModeRequestActivate
member.summary: Register a callback to be called when the mode is activated.

members.member:
Inform the mode to apply or revert data changes.
True when data needs to be apply. List of data provider type that has data applied before. Append to the list if new data type has changed. /// Return true to trigger a reimport.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorModuleMode.CanBeActivated
member.summary: The module name to display in Sprite Editor Window.
member.value: String to represent the name of the module
member.summary: Indicates if the module can be activated with the current ISpriteEditor state.
member.returns: Return true if the module can be activated.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorModuleMode.DoMainGUI
member.summary: Implement this to draw on the Sprite Editor Window.
member.remarks: Called after Sprite Editor Window draws texture preview of the Asset.Use this to draw gizmos for Sprite data.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorModuleMode.DoToolbarGUI(UnityEngine.Rect)
member.summary: Implement this to create a custom toolbar.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorModuleMode.DoPostGUI
member.summary: Implement this to draw widgets in Sprite Editor Window.
member.remarks: This method is called last to allow drawing of widgets.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorModuleMode.RequestModeToActivate
member.summary: Request mode to be activated,

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorModuleMode.spriteEditor
member.summary: ISpriteEditor context for the mode.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModeBase
member.summary: Base class for having SpriteEditorModuleBase use as a mode in another SpriteEditorModuleBase

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModeBase.ActivateMode
member.summary: This is called when a SpriteEditorModeBase is activated as a mode.
member.returns: Return true if the mode is activated

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModeBase.DeactivateMode
member.summary: This is called when SpriteEditorModeBase is deactivated as a mode.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModeBase.OnAddToModule(UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleModeSupportBase)
member.summary: This is called SpriteEditorModeBase is added to a module.
member.param: The module that added this mode

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModeBase.OnRemoveFromModule(UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleModeSupportBase)
member.summary: This is called SpriteEditorModeBase is removed from a module.
member.param: The module that removed this mode

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModeBase.RegisterOnModeRequestActivate(System.Action{UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModeBase})
member.summary: Register a callback to be called when the mode is activated.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModeBase.UnregisterOnModeRequestActivate(System.Action{UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModeBase})
member.summary: Unregister a previously registered callback.

members.member:
Inform the mode to apply or revert data changes.
True when data needs to be apply. List of data provider type that has data applied before. Append to the list if new data type has changed. /// Return true to trigger a reimport.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModeBase.RequestModeToActivate
member.summary: Request Mode to be activated

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor
member.summary: Interface that defines the functionality available for classes that inherits SpriteEditorModuleBase.
member.remarks: Used by Sprite Editor Window to encapsulate functionality accessible for Sprite Editor modules when editing Sprite data.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.spriteRects
member.summary: Sets current available Sprite rects.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.selectedSpriteRect
member.summary: The current selected Sprite rect data.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.enableMouseMoveEvent
member.summary: Indicates if ISpriteEditor should be interested in mouse move events.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.editingDisabled
member.summary: Indicates that if Sprite data editing should be disabled; for example when the Editor is in Play Mode.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.windowDimension
member.summary: Property that defines the window's current screen position and size.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.GetDataProvider``1
member.summary: Gets data provider that is supported by the current selected object.
member.returns: Instance of the data provider

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.HandleSpriteSelection
member.summary: The method updates ISpriteEditor.selectedSpriteRect based on current mouse down event and ISpriteEditor.spriteRects available.
member.returns: Returns true when ISpriteEditor.selectedSpriteRect is changed.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.RequestRepaint
member.summary: Request to repaint the current view.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.SetDataModified
member.summary: Indicates that there has been a change of data. In Sprite Editor Window, this enables the 'Apply' and 'Revert' button.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.ApplyOrRevertModification(System.Boolean)
member.summary: The method will inform current active SpriteEditorModuleBase to apply or revert any data changes.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.GetMainVisualContainer
member.summary: Returns a VisualElement for attaching child VisualElement onto the main view of a ISpriteEditor.
member.returns: Root VisualElement for the main view.
member.remarks: This method returns the root VisualElement for SpriteEditorModuleBase which uses the UIElement instead of IMGUI for its UI.A VisualElement that is added to this container has the same draw order as SpriteEditorModuleBase.DoPostGUI.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.GetToolbarRootElement
member.summary: Returns a VisualElement for attaching child Toolbar onto the toolbar of a ISpriteEditor.
member.returns: Root VisualElement for the toolbar.
member.remarks: This method returns the root VisualElement for SpriteEditorModuleBase which uses the UIElement instead of IMGUI for its UI.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.SetPreviewTexture(UnityEngine.Texture2D,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets a custom texture to be used by the ISpriteEditor during setup of the editing space.
member.param: The width dimension to render the preview texture.
The height dimension to render the preview texture.
member.remarks: When the method is called, the editing space's dimensions are set to the width and height values, affecting operations such as Zoom and Pan in the ISpriteEditor view. The preview texture is rendered as the background of the editing space.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.GetPreviewTexture(UnityEngine.Texture2D@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Get the current preview texture used by the ISpriteEditor
member.param: The width dimension used render the preview texture.
The height dimension to render the preview texture.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.ResetZoomAndScroll
member.summary: Resets the zoom and scroll of the Sprite Editor Windows.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.zoomLevel
member.summary: Current zoom level of the ISpriteEditor view.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.scrollPosition
member.summary: Current scroll position of the ISpriteEditor view. Determines the viewing location of the Texture displayed

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.showAlpha
member.summary: Whether the ISpriteEditor view is visualizing the Alpha of the Texture displayed

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.mipLevel
member.summary: The current Mip Level of the Texture displayed in ISpriteEditor view

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.GetOverlay``1(System.String)
member.summary: Get the Overlay that is registered for the ISpriteEditor.
member.param: String ID that identifies the Overlay.
member.returns: The Overlay that is associated with the ISpriteEditor.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditor.SetScenePreviewCallback(System.Action{UnityEngine.GameObject[]})
member.summary: Set a callback method to be called when the ISpriteEditor has GameObjects that needs to be preview in the SceneView.
member.param: The callback method to be called.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.RequireSpriteDataProviderAttribute
member.summary: Use this attribute on a class that inherits from SpriteEditorModuleBase to indicate what data provider it needs.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.RequireSpriteDataProviderAttribute.#ctor(System.Type[])
member.summary: Use the attribute to indicate the custom data provider that SpriteEditorBaseModule needs.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleModeAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to indicate the module that this module can be activated as a mode in.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleModeAttribute.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Type[])
member.summary: Use the attribute to indicate the custom data provider that SpriteEditorBaseModule needs.
member.param: Indicate if this module should still be listed as a module.
Type of module this can be activated as mode

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleModeAttribute.showAsModule
member.summary: Indicate if this module should still be listed as a module.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteEditorModuleModeAttribute.GetModuleTypes
member.summary: Modules that this module can be activated as a mode.
member.returns: List of module Type.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.Overlay.SpriteFrameModeToolStripBase.OnToolStripToggled
member.summary: Call to inform the rest of the tool strips that this tool strip has been toggled.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.Overlay.SpriteFrameModeToolStripBase.NotifyModeToolStripToggled(UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.Overlay.SpriteFrameModeToolStripBase)
member.summary: Notify this toolstrip when a toolstrip SpriteFrameModeToolStripBase has been toggled.
member.param: The tool strip that is toggled.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.Overlay.SpriteFrameModeToolStripBase.GetUIContent(UnityEditor.Overlays.Layout)
member.summary: Get the UI content for the tool strip.
member.returns: VisualElements to be added to the tool strip.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.Overlay.SpriteFrameModeToolStripBase.order
member.summary: Order of the visual element should be placed.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.Overlay.SpriteFrameModeToolStripBase.OverlayActivated(UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorModuleMode)
member.summary: Called when the SpriteFrame overlay tool strip is ready.
member.param: The mode that is associated to this toolstrip as indicated in GetSpriteFrameModeType.
member.returns: Returns true if the overlay can be activated. False otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.Overlay.SpriteFrameModeToolStripBase.OverlayDeactivated
member.summary: Called when the SpriteFrame overlay toolstrip is deactivated.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.Overlay.SpriteFrameModeToolStripBase.GetSpriteFrameModeType
member.summary: The type of the SpriteFrame mode that is associated with this toolstrip.
member.returns: Type of the mode.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteFrameModuleBase.spriteRects
member.summary: Mimics ISpriteEditor for SpriteEditorMode. Calls are route back to SpriteEditor but can be override by if SpriteEditorModuleModeSupportBase it wants specific behaviour.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteFrameModule.RegisterSourceTextureOverride(System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Registers a callback to override the source texture.
member.param: Callback that will write to the source texture with the path of the source texture.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EditCapability
member.summary: Structure to hold the edit capability of a sprite in Sprite Editor Window.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EditCapability.defaultCapability
member.summary: Default editing capability where all capability is allowed.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EditCapability.#ctor(UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EEditCapability[])
member.summary: Constructor to create EditCapability with specific capabilities.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EditCapability.HasCapability(UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EEditCapability)
member.summary: Check if the capability is enabled.
member.returns: True if capability is enabled. False otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EditCapability.SetCapability(UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EEditCapability,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enable or disable a capability.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EditCapability.Equals(UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EditCapability)
member.summary: Equality operator.
member.returns: True if equal, false otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EditCapability.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Equality operator.
member.returns: True if equal, false otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EditCapability.GetHashCode
member.summary: Get the hash code of the capability.
member.returns: Hash value for the data.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EEditCapability
member.summary: Edit capability flags.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EEditCapability.None
member.summary: No capability.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EEditCapability.EditSpriteName
member.summary: Edit sprite's name capability.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EEditCapability.EditSpriteRect
member.summary: Edit sprite's rect capability.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EEditCapability.EditBorder
member.summary: Edit sprite's border capability.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EEditCapability.EditPivot
member.summary: Edit sprite's pivot capability.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EEditCapability.CreateAndDeleteSprite
member.summary: Allow creation and deletion of sprite.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EEditCapability.SliceOnImport
member.summary: Allow slicing of Sprites on import of asset.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EEditCapability.All
member.summary: All capabilities are enabled.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider
member.summary: An interface that allows Sprite Editor Window to edit Sprite data for user custom importer.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider.spriteImportMode
member.summary: SpriteImportMode to indicate how Sprite data will be imported.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider.pixelsPerUnit
member.summary: The number of pixels in the sprite that correspond to one unit in world space.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider.targetObject
member.summary: The object that this data provider is acquiring its data from.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider.GetSpriteRects
member.summary: Returns an array of SpriteRect representing Sprite data the provider has.
member.returns: Array of SpriteRect.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider.SetSpriteRects(UnityEditor.SpriteRect[])
member.summary: Sets the data provider's current SpriteRect.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider.Apply
member.summary: Applying any changed data.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider.InitSpriteEditorDataProvider
member.summary: Allows the data provider to initialize any data if needed.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider.GetDataProvider``1
member.summary: Gets other data providers that might be supported by ISpriteEditorDataProvider.targetObject.
member.typeparam: The data provider type to acquire.
member.returns: Data provider type.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider.HasDataProvider(System.Type)
member.summary: Queries if ISpriteEditorDataProvider.targetObject supports the data provider type.
member.returns: True if supports, false otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider.RegisterDataChangeCallback(System.Action{UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider})
member.summary: Register callback for data change.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider.UnregisterDataChangeCallback(System.Action{UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteEditorDataProvider})
member.summary: Unregister callback for data change.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteBoneDataProvider
member.summary: Data Provider interface that deals with Sprite Bone data.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteBoneDataProvider.GetBones(UnityEngine.GUID)
member.summary: Returns the list of SpriteBone for the corresponding Sprite ID.
member.returns: The list of SpriteBone associated with the Sprite

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteBoneDataProvider.SetBones(UnityEngine.GUID,System.Collections.Generic.List{UnityEngine.U2D.SpriteBone})
member.summary: Sets a new set of SpriteBone for the corresponding Sprite ID.
member.param: List of SpriteBone to associate with the Sprite.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteNameFileIdDataProvider
member.summary: Data provider that provides data for ID to be used given a SpriteRect's name.
member.remarks: The name and ID pair is used to allow mapping back a previous created SpriteRect.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteNameFileIdDataProvider.GetNameFileIdPairs
member.summary: Returns an IEnumerable of SpriteNameFileIdPair representing the name and file id pairs the provider has.
member.returns: Name and file id pairs.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteNameFileIdDataProvider.SetNameFileIdPairs(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{UnityEditor.SpriteNameFileIdPair})
member.summary: Sets the data provider's current NameFileIdPair.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteOutlineDataProvider
member.summary: Data provider that provides the outline data for SpriteRect.
member.remarks: The outline data is used to tessellate a Sprite's mesh.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteOutlineDataProvider.GetOutlines(UnityEngine.GUID)
member.summary: Given a GUID, returns the outline data used for tessellating the SpriteRect.
member.returns: Outline data for theSpriteRect.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteOutlineDataProvider.SetOutlines(UnityEngine.GUID,System.Collections.Generic.List{UnityEngine.Vector2[]})
member.summary: Given a GUID, sets the outline data used for tessellating the SpriteRect.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteOutlineDataProvider.GetTessellationDetail(UnityEngine.GUID)
member.summary: Given a GUID, returns the tessellation detail.Tessellation value should be between 0 to 1.
member.returns: The tessellation value.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteOutlineDataProvider.SetTessellationDetail(UnityEngine.GUID,System.Single)
member.summary: Given a GUID, sets the tessellation detail.Tessellation value should be between 0 to 1.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpritePhysicsOutlineDataProvider
member.summary: Data provider that provides the Physics outline data for SpriteRect.
member.remarks: Uses the outline data to generate the Sprite's Physics shape for Polygon Collider 2D.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpritePhysicsOutlineDataProvider.GetOutlines(UnityEngine.GUID)
member.summary: Given a GUID, returns the Physics outline data used for the SpriteRect.
member.returns: Physics outline data for the SpriteRect.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpritePhysicsOutlineDataProvider.SetOutlines(UnityEngine.GUID,System.Collections.Generic.List{UnityEngine.Vector2[]})
member.summary: Given a GUID, sets the Physics outline data used for the SpriteRect.
member.param: Physics outline data for the SpriteRect.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpritePhysicsOutlineDataProvider.GetTessellationDetail(UnityEngine.GUID)
member.summary: Given a GUID, returns the tessellation detail.Tessellation value should be between 0 to 1.
member.returns: The tessellation value.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpritePhysicsOutlineDataProvider.SetTessellationDetail(UnityEngine.GUID,System.Single)
member.summary: Given a GUID, sets the tessellation detail.Tessellation value should be between 0 to 1.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ITextureDataProvider
member.summary: Data provider that provides texture data needed for Sprite Editor Window.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ITextureDataProvider.texture
member.summary: Texture2D representation of the data provider.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ITextureDataProvider.previewTexture
member.summary: Texture2D that represents the preview for ITextureDataProvider.texture.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ITextureDataProvider.GetTextureActualWidthAndHeight(System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: The actual width and height of the texture data.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ITextureDataProvider.GetReadableTexture2D
member.summary: Readable version of ITextureProvider.texture.
member.returns: Texture2D that is readable.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ITextureDataProvider.OverrideTextures(UnityEngine.Texture2D,UnityEngine.Texture2D,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Overrides the texture data with the given textures.
member.param: Width of the override source texture.
Height of the override source texture.
member.returns: Returns true if override is successful, false otherwise

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ITextureDataProvider.ClearOverrideTextures
member.summary: Remove override textures previously set by OverrideTextures.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ITextureDataProvider.RegisterSourceTextureOverride(System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Registers a callback to override the source texture.
member.param: Callback that will write to the source texture with the path of the source texture.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ITextureDataProvider.UnregisterSourceTextureOverride(System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Unregister a callback to override the source texture.
member.param: Callback that was registered to write to the source texture with the path of the source texture.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ITextureDataProvider.RegisterDataChangeCallback(System.Action{UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ITextureDataProvider})
member.summary: Register callback for data change.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ITextureDataProvider.UnregisterDataChangeCallback(System.Action{UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ITextureDataProvider})
member.summary: Unregister callback for data change.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISecondaryTextureDataProvider
member.summary: Data provider that provides secoondary texture data needed for Sprite Editor Window.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISecondaryTextureDataProvider.textures
member.summary: Get set method for an array of SecondarySpriteTexture in the Data Provider

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.Vertex2DMetaData
member.summary: A structure that contains meta data about vertices in a Sprite.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.Vertex2DMetaData.position
member.summary: The position of the vertex.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.Vertex2DMetaData.boneWeight
member.summary: The BoneWeight of the vertex.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteMeshDataProvider
member.summary: Data Provider interface that deals with Sprite mesh data.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteMeshDataProvider.GetVertices(UnityEngine.GUID)
member.summary: Returns the list of vertex datas for the corresponding Sprite ID.
member.returns: Returns the vertices for the given Sprite ID.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteMeshDataProvider.SetVertices(UnityEngine.GUID,UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.Vertex2DMetaData[])
member.summary: Sets a new list of vertices for the corresponding Sprite ID.
member.param: The vertices to set for the Sprite ID.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteMeshDataProvider.GetIndices(UnityEngine.GUID)
member.summary: Returns the list of mesh index for the corresponding Sprite ID.
member.returns: Returns the indices for the given Sprite ID.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteMeshDataProvider.SetIndices(UnityEngine.GUID,System.Int32[])
member.summary: Sets a new list of indices for the corresponding Sprite ID.
member.param: The indices to set for the Sprite ID.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteMeshDataProvider.GetEdges(UnityEngine.GUID)
member.summary: Returns the list of mesh edges for the corresponding Sprite ID.
member.returns: Returns the edges for the given Sprite ID.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteMeshDataProvider.SetEdges(UnityEngine.GUID,UnityEngine.Vector2Int[])
member.summary: Sets a new list of edges for the corresponding Sprite ID.
member.param: An array of Vector2Int representing the edges for the Sprite ID.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteCustomDataProvider
member.summary: Data Provider interface that allows to get and set custom Sprite data.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteCustomDataProvider.GetKeys
member.summary: Gets all available keys.
member.returns: Collection of all available keys.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteCustomDataProvider.SetData(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the custom data at the given key.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteCustomDataProvider.RemoveData(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the custom data at the given key.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteCustomDataProvider.GetData(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Gets the custom data at the given key.
member.returns: True if the value retrieved successfully.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteFrameEditCapability
member.summary: Data Provider interface that allows to get and editing capability of Sprite Frame.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteFrameEditCapability.GetEditCapability
member.summary: Gets the current editing capability.
member.returns: Editing capabilities allowed

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.ISpriteFrameEditCapability.SetEditCapability(UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.EditCapability)
member.summary: Sets the editing capability.

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteRectModel.m_SpriteRects
member.summary: List of all SpriteRects

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteRectModel.m_SpriteNames
member.summary: List of all names in the Name-FileId Table

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteRectModel.m_SpriteFileIds
member.summary: List of all FileIds in the Name-FileId Table

member.name: F:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteRectModel.m_NamesInUse
member.summary: HashSet of all names currently in use by SpriteRects

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteRectModel.IsNameUsed(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether or not the name is currently in use by any of the SpriteRects in the texture.
member.returns: True if the name is currently in use

member.name: M:UnityEditor.U2D.Sprites.SpriteRectModel.IsInternalIdInUsed(UnityEngine.GUID)
member.summary: Checks whether or not the id is currently in use by any of the SpriteRects in the texture.
member.returns: True if the name is currently in use

member.name: T:UnityEditor.SpriteRect
member.summary: Abstract class that is used by systems to encapsulate Sprite data representation. Currently this is used by Sprite Editor Window.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.SpriteRect.name
member.summary: The name of the Sprite data.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.SpriteRect.pivot
member.summary: Vector2value representing the pivot for the Sprite data.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.SpriteRect.alignment
member.summary: SpriteAlignment that represents the pivot value for the Sprite data.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.SpriteRect.border
member.summary: Returns a Vector4 that represents the border of the Sprite data.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.SpriteRect.customData
member.summary: Gets and sets the custom sprite data.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.SpriteRect.rect
member.summary: Rect value that represents the position and size of the Sprite data.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.SpriteRect.spriteID
member.summary: GUID to uniquely identify the SpriteRect data. This will be populated to Sprite.spriteID to identify the SpriteRect used to generate the Sprite.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.SpriteRect.GetSpriteIDFromSerializedProperty(UnityEditor.SerializedProperty)
member.summary: Helper method to get SpriteRect.spriteID from a SerializedProperty.
member.returns: GUID for the SpriteRect.

member.name: T:UnityEditor.SpriteNameFileIdPair
member.summary: Data structure to hold Name ID pair.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.SpriteNameFileIdPair.name
member.summary: Name property.

member.name: P:UnityEditor.SpriteNameFileIdPair.fileId
member.summary: FileId property. This property is obsolete. Please use GetFileGUID and SetFileGUID instead.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.SpriteNameFileIdPair.GetFileGUID
member.summary: Returns the ID used for the name.
member.returns: GUID value.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.SpriteNameFileIdPair.SetFileGUID(UnityEngine.GUID)
member.summary: Sets the ID used for the name.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.SpriteNameFileIdPair.#ctor
member.summary: Default constructor.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.SpriteNameFileIdPair.#ctor(System.String,UnityEngine.GUID)
member.summary: Constructor to initialize name and fileID.
member.param: The name of the Sprite to record.
The GUID of the Sprite to record.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.SpriteNameFileIdPair.GetHashCode
member.summary: Custom hashcode generation.
member.returns: Int value representing the hash value.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.SpriteNameFileIdPair.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Override Equal operator.
member.returns: True if the same. False otherwise.

member.name: M:UnityEditor.SpriteNameFileIdPair.Equals(UnityEditor.SpriteNameFileIdPair)
member.summary: Override Equal operator.
member.returns: True if the same. False otherwise.
